title: Multilevel pharmacokinetics-driven modeling of metabolomics data.

S-EPMC5306155 PMC5306155 Multilevel pharmacokinetics-driven modeling of metabolomics data.

Introduction

Multilevel modeling is a quantitative statistical method to investigate variability and relationships between variables of interest, taking into account population structure
